title: Contract C07: Timeline → Export / Publish
description: Governs the transition from an approved timeline to final export and YouTube publishing. Defines render approval gates, SEO pre-publish checks, thumbnail approval, content policy validation, and post-publish state updates. This is the terminal contract in the pipeline — once passed, the video is published.

upstream_documents.required_state: selected_concept_id must be non-null AND corresponding concept.status must be 'approved'
review_decision must be 'GO' or 'GO_WITH_FIXES' AND review_open_fixes must be 0

downstream_state.description: After this contract is satisfied and publish succeeds, export.json is updated to reflect final state.

input.description: All conditions that must be satisfied before the publish action is executed.

timeline_requirements.purpose: Prevents publishing from an unapproved or draft edit.
Render must be complete before publish. output_file_path = null means render has not run.
All render settings must be populated. Missing settings → render will fail or produce incorrect output.

seo_requirements.purpose: A title must be selected before publishing.
The selected title must be approved. A draft or rejected title cannot be published.
Title must have been fact-checked before use.
Title must have been checked against story_bible forbidden expressions.

seo_requirements.conditional: Required true if research.json contains any facts with status=disputed
seo_requirements.purpose: Viewer must be informed of disputed historical claims.
SEO must have explicit human sign-off before publishing.
If forced_labor or historical_violence present, content_declaration must be populated.

thumbnail_requirements.purpose: Thumbnail must have been reviewed for potential disrespect before publishing.
Thumbnail file must exist before publishing.

review_gate_requirements.purpose: All review fixes must be resolved before publishing. Open fixes = production debt that blocks publish.

output.description: State changes made to export.json after successful publishing.

export_updates.value: Must equal metrics.review_fixes_required at publish time

post_publish_actions: Set seo.publishing.visibility to 'public' or 'scheduled' based on publish decision
Add video to seo.publishing.playlist_ids if applicable
Upload subtitle file to YouTube via YouTube Data API

checks.action_on_fail: Complete timeline review. Get director approval. Set status to 'approved'.
Run render. Confirm output file exists at specified path.
Select a title from seo.titles where status=approved.
Run factual accuracy check on title. Confirm against research.json.
Halt publish. Return to review gate. Resolve all blocker issues.
Complete all open fixes. Update export.review_fixes_resolved count.
Perform respect check. Document result in respect_check_notes.

checks.description: seo.content_policy.content_declaration is non-empty if sensitive_topics is non-empty
seo.description.dispute_disclosure_included = true if any research fact has status=disputed
checks.action_on_fail: Add dispute disclosure to description text.

failure_conditions.human_action: Review is blocked. Address all BLOCKER and HIGH issues. Re-submit for review.
Delete factually incorrect title (FIX-B1 applies for Title B). Select a different approved title.
Perform respect check. Document result. Only proceed if result is acceptable.

failure_conditions.condition: Render file does not exist at output_file_path
failure_conditions.human_action: Re-run render. Confirm render completes successfully. Verify file at path.
Complete all open fixes listed in review/production_go_no_go.md. Update export.json fix count.

recovery_strategy.strategy: Work through fix commands in priority order: BLOCKER → HIGH → MEDIUM → LOW. Mark each fixed in export.json. Decrement review_open_fixes by 1 per fix. Only proceed to publish when review_open_fixes = 0.

Take the background image from image_plan.json (via selected_concept.background.image_id_ref). Apply text overlays per concept definition. Export as 1280×720 JPG under 2MB. Set file_path. Set status=approved after respect check.

recovery_strategy.scenario: Title factual issue discovered at publish gate
recovery_strategy.strategy: Flag title as rejected. Set rejection_reason. Remove from seo.titles array. Select next-best approved title. If no approved title exists, write and approve a new one.
Check render log for error. Common causes: missing input file, codec not installed, bitrate too high. Fix cause. Re-run render. Do not publish from a partial or corrupt render output.
